memoryArtifacts.description: I found the boddiefam.txt on the Internet and was very excited to get it. This document traces “the Royal Lineage of the Boddie Family” all the way back to Julius Caesar. It is extremely well document …

zh.Much, Waltham, Essex, England: 英國英格蘭艾可沃爾坦
zh.Great Waltham, Essex, England: 英國英格蘭艾可格亞特 沃爾坦
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Cornish於1424年出生在英國艾可格亞特 沃爾坦時，他的父親John Cornish35歲，母親Agnes Waltham22歲。他於1462年與Agnes在英國艾可格亞特 沃爾坦結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1514年1月7日在英國艾可沃爾坦享年90歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可。

zh-hans.Great Waltham, Essex, England: 英国英格兰艾可格亞特 沃爾坦
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Cornish于1424年出生在英国艾可格亞特 沃爾坦时，他的父亲John Cornish35岁，母亲Agnes Waltham22岁。他于1462年与Agnes在英国艾可格亞特 沃爾坦结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1514年1月7日在英国艾可沃爾坦享年90岁，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可。

nameMeanings.name: Cornish
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name for someone from the county of Cornwall, from Middle English Cornish, Cornysh formed on the analogy of English, which was usually Normanized as Corneys. Not surprisingly, the surname is common in adjacent Devon, but it is also established as far afield as Suffolk and London.

variants.name: Corns
meanings: English (Staffordshire and Lancashire): variant of Cornish or Corn , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Cornish was born in 1424, in Great Waltham, Essex, England, his father, John Cornish, was 35 and his mother, Agnes Waltham, was 22. He married Agnes in 1462, in Great Waltham, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 7 January 1514, in Waltham, Essex, England, at the age of 90, and was buried in Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Cornish est né en 1424, à Great Waltham, Essex, Angleterre, son père, John Cornish, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Agnes Waltham, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Agnes en 1462, à Great Waltham, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 7 janvier 1514, à Waltham, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 90 ans, et a été enterré à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Great Waltham, Essex, England: Great Waltham, Essex, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John Cornish 1424 in Great Waltham, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Cornish 35 und seine Mutter Agnes Waltham 22. Er hat 1462 in Great Waltham, Essex, England Agnes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 7. Januar 1514 im Alter von 90 Jahren in Waltham, Essex, England und wurde in Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Agnes nel 1462, nel Great Waltham, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 7 gennaio 1514, nel Waltham, Essex, England, all'età di 90 anni, e fu sepolto a Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Cornishが1424年にイギリスエセックスグレアト ワルサムで生まれた時，父John Cornishは35歳，母Agnes Walthamは22歳であった。1462年にイギリスエセックスグレアト ワルサムでAgnesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1514年1月7日にイギリスエセックスワルサムで90歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Cornish(이)가 1424년 영국 에세스 그리트 월섬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Cornish(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Waltham(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1462년 영국 에세스 그리트 월섬에서 Agnes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1514년 1월 7일 영국 에세스 월섬에서 90세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Cornish nasceu em 1424, em Great Waltham, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Cornish, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Waltham, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes em 1462, em Great Waltham, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 7 de janeiro de 1514, em Waltham, Essex, Inglaterra, com 90 anos, e foi sepultado em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Great Waltham, Essex, England: Great Waltham, Essex, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Cornish родился в 1424 г. в местности грит валтам, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John Cornish было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Waltham, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes в 1462 г. в местности грит валтам, эссекс, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 7 января 1514 г. в местности валтам, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 90 лет и был похоронен в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Agnes en 1462, en Great Waltham, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
